# ST01 프로젝트 작업 기록

## 2026-02-01 13:27 - RFID 태그 ID 읽기 방식 변경 및 Pallet DB 함수 추가
- `FrmMain.vb` Read_RFiD(): PopV4 방식 태그 ID 읽기 명령으로 변경
- `FrmMain.vb` ThreadTask1(): Dec2Hex 파싱, 16자 태그 ID 추출 방식으로 변경
- `FrmMain.vb` Write_RFID(): 함수 삭제 (더 이상 RFID 직접 쓰기 안 함)
- `FrmMain.vb` SavePallet(): Pallet DB 저장 함수 추가 (Table_pallet INSERT or UPDATE)
- `FrmMain.vb` wStep 13.1: Write_RFID -> SavePallet 호출로 변경
- `FrmMain.vb` wStep 13.2: RFID 검증 로직 제거, 타이머 대기 후 바로 OK 처리

## 2026-02-01 15:03 - CN8 라벨 추가
- `FrmMain.Designer.vb`: srcCN8 라벨 컨트롤 추가 (New, Controls.Add, 속성 블록, Friend WithEvents)
- `FrmMain.Designer.vb`: 기존 4개 라벨(srcCN7/srcAD/srcAE/srcPD) Size 117->93, Font 24->21로 변경하여 5등분 배치
- `FrmMain.vb`: OPTION_CARTYPE 분기에 CN8 추가 (BackColor 설정)

        srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = ""
        srcHBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
        srcHBArcode_Target.Text = ""

    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL
            Serial_Tool.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool.Open()
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL)
        End Try


    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_WorkPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value = str
                Rs.Update()
            End If

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        'If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) >= 11 Then

        '    Init_Control()
        '    Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
        '    ' 칼라코드 분리
        '    If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) > 11 Then
        '        srcColorCode.Text = Mid(Label_Scanner.Text, 12)
        '    End If
        '    Save_WorkPArt(Label_Scanner.Text)
        '    Load_PArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Left(Label_Scanner.Text, 11))
        '    wStep = 4

        'Else

        If wStep = 9 Then

            ' 모터 바코드 미완료 시 모터 바코드 스캔
            If srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text <> "OK" And srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text <> "NA" And srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text <> "PASS" Then
                If InStr(1, ScanData, srcMotorBArcode_Target.Text) <> 0 Then
                    srcMotorBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                Else
                    srcMotorBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If

                ' 하네스 바코드 미완료 시 하네스 바코드 스캔
            ElseIf srcHBArcode_DEc.Text <> "OK" And srcHBArcode_DEc.Text <> "NA" And srcHBArcode_DEc.Text <> "PASS" Then
                If InStr(1, ScanData, srcHBArcode_Target.Text) <> 0 Then
                    srcHBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                Else
                    srcHBArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If
            Else
                ' 스캔할 항목 없음 (모두 PASS/NA/OK)
                NG()
            End If

        Else

            label_Message.Text = "Reset Need"

        End If

        'End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Dim basePartNo As String = If(str.Length > 11, Microsoft.VisualBasic.Left(str, 11), str)
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE Part_No = '" & basePartNo & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

                srcPartNo.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value)
                srcPartName.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)

                LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)

                OPTION_CARTYPE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR").Value)
                OPTION_LHRH = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
                OPTION_RECL = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_RECL").Value)
                OPTION_VENT = SafeBool(Rs.Fields("OPTION_VENT").Value)
                OPTION_LSUPT = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LSUPT").Value)

                TARGET_RECL_SN = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("RECL_SN").Value)
                TARGET_SAB_SN = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("SAB_SN").Value)
                TARGET_LSUPT_SN = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("LSUPT_SN").Value)

                If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
                    srcLSUPT.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcLSUPT.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then

                    srcMotorBArcode.Text = "NA"
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcMotorBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcMotorBArcode_Target.Text = "NA"

                    srcMotoTQ.Text = "NA"
                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcMotorTQ_SPEC.Text = "NA"

                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then

                    If FUNCTION_MOTOR_TQ = True Then

                        srcMotoTQ.Text = ""
                        srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = ""
                        srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                        srcMotorTQ_SPEC.Text = ""
                        srcMotorTQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_UNIT

                    Else

                        srcMotoTQ.Text = "PASS"
                        srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                        srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                        srcMotorTQ_SPEC.Text = ""
                        srcMotorTQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_UNIT

                    End If

                    If FUNCTION_MOTOR_SERIAL = True Then

                        srcMotorBArcode.Text = ""
                        srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                        srcMotorBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                        srcMotorBArcode_Target.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("RECL_SN").Value)

                    Else

                        srcMotorBArcode.Text = "PASS"
                        srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                        srcMotorBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                        srcMotorBArcode_Target.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("RECL_SN").Value)

                    End If

                End If

                If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                    srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                    srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.Black
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If TARGET_SAB_SN <> "0" Then
                    srcSAB.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcSAB.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                ' 하네스 바코드 설정
                Dim harnessVal As String = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Harness_SN").Value)
                If harnessVal = "" Or harnessVal = "0" Then
                    srcHBArcode.Text = "NA"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcHBArcode_Target.Text = "NA"
                ElseIf FUNCTION_HARNESS_SCAN = True Then
                    srcHBArcode.Text = ""
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = ""
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcHBArcode_Target.Text = harnessVal
                Else
                    srcHBArcode.Text = "PASS"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS"
                    srcHBArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Green
                    srcHBArcode_Target.Text = harnessVal
                End If

                If OPTION_VENT = True Then
                    srcVENT.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcVENT.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                wStep = 4

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()
        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 28 Then
                        If Mid(sRecvData, 11, 1) = "E" Then
                            Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = tagId
                            ' 최초 인식 시 캡처
                            If RFID_TAG_ID = "" Then RFID_TAG_ID = tagId
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                    Else
                        Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    End If
                    sRecvData = ""
                    Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            End If
            Thread.Sleep(10)
        Loop
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))

                            If wStep = 9 Then

                                srcMotoTQ.Text = ToolData

                                If ToolData >= BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    DingDOng()
                                Else
                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "NG"
                                    srcMotorTQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    NG()
                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private harnessColumnEnsured As Boolean = False

    ' TABLE_MAIN에 HARNESS_SN 컬럼 없으면 자동 생성
    Private Sub EnsureHarnessColumn()
        If harnessColumnEnsured Then Exit Sub
        Try
            Sql_Connect.Execute("IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN') AND name = 'HARNESS_SN') " &
                                "ALTER TABLE TABLE_MAIN ADD HARNESS_SN nvarchar(100) NULL")
            harnessColumnEnsured = True

        End Try

        Try

                                "CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_TABLE_MAIN_ST01_DATE ON TABLE_MAIN (ST01_DATE)")

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()
        EnsureIndex()
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly
            Rs.Open("SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM Table_Main WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ST01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

            Dim cnt As Integer = SafeInt(Rs.Fields("CNT").Value)
            tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(cnt + LOT_START + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text & srcColorCode.Text
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_Now()

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Work WITH (NOLOCK)", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                WORK_PARTNO = Trim(Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Init_Grid()

        With Grid1

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 3
            .Rows = 1
            .FixedRows = 2
            .FrozenBottomRows = 1

            .Column(1).Locked = True
            .Column(2).Locked = True

            For i As Integer = 1 To 2

                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            Next

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 220
            .Column(2).Width = 170

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "품번"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "생산수량"

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Grid()

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,Count_ST01 FROM Table_Part WITH (NOLOCK)", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    If SafeInt(Rs.Fields("Count_ST01").Value) <> 0 Then
                        Grid1.AddItem(SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value) & Chr(9) &
                                      SafeInt(Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST01").Value))
                    End If
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Reset_Count()

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,COUNT_ST01 FROM Table_Part", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST01").Value = "0"
                    Rs.Update()
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_Count()

        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,COUNT_ST01 FROM Table_Part Where Part_No = '" & srcPartNo.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Not (Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True) Then
                Dim tmp As Integer = SafeInt(Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST01").Value)
                tmp = tmp + 1
                If tmp > 20000 Then tmp = 0
                Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST01").Value = tmp
                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step.Text = wStep

        ' 저장 단계(wStep >= 13)에서는 PLC 리셋 무시 (데이터 손실 방지)
        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 And wStep < 13 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            wStep = 0
        End If

        'If (wStep > 0 And wStep <= 2) And (wStep >= 6 And wStep <= 8) Then
        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        'Elseh
        '    FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        'End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID = "" ' 새 사이클 시작 - 태그ID 클리어
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3] Check_Now 시작" & vbCrLf)
            Try
                WORK_PARTNO = ""
                Check_Now()
                Label2.Text = WORK_PARTNO.ToString
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3] Check_Now 완료 PARTNO=" & WORK_PARTNO & " → wStep=3.1" & vbCrLf)
                wStep = 3.1
            Catch ex As Exception
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3] Check_Now 오류: " & ex.Message & vbCrLf)
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] Load_PArt 시작" & vbCrLf)
            Try
                If WORK_PARTNO.Length >= 11 Then
                    ' 칼라코드 분리
                    If WORK_PARTNO.Length > 11 Then
                        srcColorCode.Text = Mid(WORK_PARTNO, 12)
                    End If
                    Load_PArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Left(WORK_PARTNO, 11))
                    TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] Load_PArt 완료 → wStep=4" & vbCrLf)
                Else
                    ' PARTNO 없음 → wStep=3으로 복귀해서 사양 재조회 (사양 변경 타이밍 이슈 대응)
                    TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] PARTNO 길이부족 → wStep=3 재시도" & vbCrLf)
                    wStep = 3
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] Load_PArt 오류: " & ex.Message & " → wStep=3 재시도" & vbCrLf)
                wStep = 3
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [4] PLC_WRITE 시작" & vbCrLf)
            PLC_STRING = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If

            If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", PLC_STRING)
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [4] PLC_WRITE 완료 → wStep=5" & vbCrLf)
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [5] 진입 → wStep=6" & vbCrLf)
            wStep = 6

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [6] Create_Serial 시작" & vbCrLf)
            Try
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [6] Create_Serial 완료 → wStep=7 serial=" & srcSerialNumber.Text & vbCrLf)
                wStep = 7
            Catch ex As Exception
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [6] Create_Serial 오류: " & ex.Message & vbCrLf)
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            wStep = 8

        ElseIf wStep = 8 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then ' 모터 스캔, 토크, 하네스 바코드 작업

            If (srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcMotorBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcMotorTQ_DEc.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcHBArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep = 11
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4051", "1")
            wStep = 12

        ElseIf wStep = 12 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then
                wStep = 13
            Else
                wStep = 11
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 13 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(2) = 1 Then
                wStep = 13.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 13.1 Then
            Try
                SavePallet(RFID_TAG_ID, srcSerialNumber.Text)
                Tmr_Count = 0
                wStep = 13.2
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 13.2 Then
            Tmr_Count = Tmr_Count + 0.1
            If Tmr_Count >= 0.5 Then
                LAbel_RF_CHECK.Text = "OK"
                LAbel_RF_CHECK.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep = 13.3
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 13.3 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4058", "1")
            wStep = 13.4

        ElseIf wStep = 13.4 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(20) = 1 Then
                wStep = 14
            Else
                wStep = 13.3
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 14 Then

            Try
                Save_DB()
                wStep = 14.1
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 14.1 Then

            Try
                Save_Count()
                wStep = 14.2
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 14.2 Then

            Init_Grid()
            Try
                Load_Grid()
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 15

        ElseIf wStep = 15 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                wStep = 0
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        Connection_ForceClose()
    End Sub

    Private Shared appMutex As System.Threading.Mutex

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean = False
        appMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "CN7_ST01_MUTEX", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "CN7 ST01", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            End
        End If

        ' DB 연결 초기화 (영구 연결)
        Connection_Open()
        Connection_Open_MDB()
        EnsureMdbColumns()

        InitializeActPlc()
        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid()
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()

        SerialOpen()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.110"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        Init_Grid()
        Load_Grid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4000" & vbLf &
                                "D4001" & vbLf &
                                "D4002" & vbLf &
                                "D4003" & vbLf &
                                "D4004" & vbLf &
                                "D4005" & vbLf &
                                "D4006" & vbLf &
                                "D4007" & vbLf &
                                "D4008" & vbLf &
                                "D4009" & vbLf &
                                "D4010" & vbLf &
                                "D4011" & vbLf &
                                "D4050" & vbLf &
                                "D4051" & vbLf &
                                "D4052" & vbLf &
                                "D4053" & vbLf &
                                "D4054" & vbLf &
                                "D4055" & vbLf &
                                "D4056" & vbLf &
                                "D4057" & vbLf &
                                "D4058" & vbLf &
                                "D4059" & vbLf &
                                "D4060" & vbLf &
                                "D4061"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_Tool_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_Tool.Tick

        If Tool_Connection = False Then
            Tool_Connection = True
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "002099990010" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        ElseIf Tool_Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") &
            Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button5_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button5.Click

        Check_Now()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button6_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button6.Click
        Reset_Count()
        Init_Grid()
        Load_Grid()
    End Sub

    ' MX Component ActiveX 동적 생성 (디자이너 깨짐 방지)
    Private Sub InitializeActPlc()
        Try
            ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
            CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
            ACT_PLC1.Enabled = True
            ACT_PLC1.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(1735, 5)
            ACT_PLC1.Name = "ACT_PLC1"
            ACT_PLC1.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(32, 32)
            ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
            Me.Panel6.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
            CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("ACT_PLC1 초기화 실패: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' 팔레트 저장 (INSERT or UPDATE)
    Private Sub SavePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String, ByVal strSerial As String)
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            Else
                Rs.AddNew()
                Rs.Fields("PalletID").Value = strPalletID
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try
    End Sub

End Class

# CN7 FRT BACK ASSEMBLE LINE 프로젝트

## DB 접속 정보
- Provider: SQLOLEDB
- Server: 192.168.0.200\CN7_SVR
- Database: CN7_FRT
- User: sa / sns123.,
- SQL Server 2008 Enterprise (RTM) 10.0.1600.22 x64

## 프로젝트 구조
- PART_SELECT: 품번 선택 프로그램 (VB.NET WinForms)
- ST01: 1공정 - 모터 바코드/토크 검사 (싱글 RFID)
- ST03: 3공정 - SAB 어셈블리 (듀얼 RFID)
- ST05: 5공정 - L-SUPT 어셈블리 (듀얼 RFID)
- ST15: 15공정 - 바코드/라벨 인쇄, 마지막 공정 (싱글 RFID)
- NOISE TEST: 방음실 검사

## 작업 내역

### 2026-02-01 13:30
1. **PART_SELECT - ComboBox1 차종 동적 로드**
   - FrmMain.vb, FrmPlanInput.vb: 하드코딩(CN7,AD,AE,PD) → DB(Table_Part DISTINCT OPTION_CAR) 조회로 변경
   - FrmPlanInput.vb: ComboBox1_SelectedIndexChanged If/ElseIf 분기 → 동적 호출로 변경
   - ComboBox1에서 "ALL" 항목 제거

2. **PART_SELECT - ComboBoxColor 칼라코드 기능 추가**
   - Table_COlor 테이블 연동 (ID, ColorCode, CarType)
   - 차종 선택 시 해당 CarType의 칼라코드 ComboBoxColor에 로드 (NONE은 마지막 정렬)
   - 칼라코드 등록된 차종에서 미선택 시 메시지박스 경고
   - 칼라코드가 NONE이 아닌 경우 품번+칼라코드 합쳐서 저장 (예: 88888-11111NNB)
   - 그리드 미선택 시 "품번을 선택하세요" 메시지박스 추가

3. **ST01~ST15 ACT_PLC1 디자이너→코드 이동**
   - 4개 공정(ST01,ST03,ST05,ST15) FrmMain.Designer.vb에서 ACT_PLC1 관련 코드 제거
   - FrmMain.vb에 InitializeActPlc() 메서드 추가 (동적 생성, Try-Catch, Visible=False)
   - FrmMain_Load에서 InitializeActPlc() 호출

4. **ST01~ST15 RFID 태그 ID 읽기 방식으로 전환**
   - 기존: RFID 태그에 데이터 직접 쓰기/읽기 (23자 시리얼번호)
   - 변경: RFID 태그 고유 ID 읽기 (16자 hex) + Table_pallet DB 매핑
   - Read_RFiD(): PopV4 방식 태그 ID 읽기 명령으로 변경 (8바이트)
   - ThreadTask1/3(): Dec2Hex 파싱, 28자 패킷에서 16자 태그 ID 추출
   - Write_RFID 함수 삭제 (더 이상 태그에 쓰지 않음)
   - ST01: SavePallet(tagID, serial) - INSERT or UPDATE
   - ST03, ST05: LoadPallet(tagID) - 조회만
   - ST15: LoadPallet(tagID) + DeletePallet(tagID) - 마지막 공정 완료 후 삭제
   - Table_pallet 구조: ID(numeric), PalletID(nvarchar50), SerialNumber(nvarchar50)

5. **전 공정 CN8 차종 PLC 코드 추가**
   - ST01, ST03(x2), ST05(x2), ST15: OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" → PLC_STRING 8번째 자리 "5"

6. **NOISE TEST - RFID 태그 ID 방식 적용**
   - Read_RFiD, ThreadTask1: PopV4 방식으로 변경
   - LoadPallet 함수 추가
   - Module1.vb에 Dec2Hex 함수 추가

### 2026-02-01 14:34
7. **전 공정 SQL Server 데드락 방지 수정**
   - Module1.vb: Connection_Open/Close → 영구 연결 (State 체크, 재연결), Connection_ForceClose() 추가
   - Module1.vb: Connection_Open_MDB/Close_MDB → 영구 연결
   - Module1.vb: SafeStr/SafeInt/SafeDbl/SafeBool NULL 안전 헬퍼 함수 추가

   - FrmMain.vb: FrmMain_Load에서 Connection_Open + Connection_Open_MDB 호출
   - FrmMain.vb: FrmMain_FormClosing 추가 → Connection_ForceClose()
   - FrmMain.vb: 모든 DB 함수에 Try/Catch/Finally (Rs 정리)
   - FrmMain.vb: 읽기 전용 쿼리에 WITH (NOLOCK) 추가
   - FrmMain.vb: 타이머 DB 호출부 Try/Catch (실패 시 wStep 유지 → 자동 재시도, MsgBox 없음)
   - FrmMain.vb: wStep 다중 DB 호출 스텝 분리 (Save_DB + Save_Count + Load_Grid → 별도 스텝)
   - FrmMain.vb: Table_Part 필드 접근 시 SafeStr/SafeInt/SafeBool 적용 (NULL → 기본값)
   - 적용 대상: ST01, ST03, ST05, ST15, NOISE TEST

    - 회색 점선: 데이터 범위 경계 (외삽 영역 구분)

    - DAQ_START: EMA 변수 NaN 초기화 (첫 콜백 시 원본값으로 세팅)

Private Sub SavePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String, ByVal strSerial As String)
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            Else
                Rs.AddNew()
                Rs.Fields("PalletID").Value = strPalletID
                Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSerial
                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try
    End Sub

End Class

Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()
        EnsureIndex()
        Try
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly
            Rs.Open("SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM Table_Main WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ST01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

            Dim cnt As Integer = SafeInt(Rs.Fields("CNT").Value)
            tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(cnt + LOT_START + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text & srcColorCode.Text
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            If Rs.State = ADODB.ObjectStateEnum.adStateOpen Then
                Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                Rs.Close()
            End If
        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Private Sub Button2_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click

        FrmPart.Show()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        For i As Integer = 0 To 47
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            End If
        Next i

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_Now()

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step.Text = wStep

        ' 저장 단계(wStep >= 13)에서는 PLC 리셋 무시 (데이터 손실 방지)
        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 And wStep < 13 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            wStep = 0
        End If

        'If (wStep > 0 And wStep <= 2) And (wStep >= 6 And wStep <= 8) Then
        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        'Elseh
        '    FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        'End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID = "" ' 새 사이클 시작 - 태그ID 클리어
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3] Check_Now 시작" & vbCrLf)
            Try
                WORK_PARTNO = ""
                Check_Now()
                Label2.Text = WORK_PARTNO.ToString
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3] Check_Now 완료 PARTNO=" & WORK_PARTNO & " → wStep=3.1" & vbCrLf)
                wStep = 3.1
            Catch ex As Exception
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3] Check_Now 오류: " & ex.Message & vbCrLf)
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] Load_PArt 시작" & vbCrLf)
            Try
                If WORK_PARTNO.Length >= 11 Then
                    ' 칼라코드 분리
                    If WORK_PARTNO.Length > 11 Then
                        srcColorCode.Text = Mid(WORK_PARTNO, 12)
                    End If
                    Load_PArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Left(WORK_PARTNO, 11))
                    TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] Load_PArt 완료 → wStep=4" & vbCrLf)
                Else
                    ' PARTNO 없음 → wStep=3으로 복귀해서 사양 재조회 (사양 변경 타이밍 이슈 대응)
                    TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] PARTNO 길이부족 → wStep=3 재시도" & vbCrLf)
                    wStep = 3
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [3.1] Load_PArt 오류: " & ex.Message & " → wStep=3 재시도" & vbCrLf)
                wStep = 3
            End Try

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [4] PLC_WRITE 시작" & vbCrLf)
            PLC_STRING = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If

            If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", PLC_STRING)
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [4] PLC_WRITE 완료 → wStep=5" & vbCrLf)
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then
            TextBox1.AppendText(Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & " [5] 진입 → wStep=6" & vbCrLf)
            wStep = 6

Now I have a clear picture. Let me trace the flow:

1. `wStep=6`: `Create_Serial()` is called and assigns the result to `srcSerialNumber.Text`
2. `wStep=13.1`: `SavePallet(RFID_TAG_ID, srcSerialNumber.Text)` is called

Let me look at `Create_Serial()` more carefully:

```vb
Private Function Create_Serial() As String
    Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
    Dim tmp As String = ""
    
    Connection_Open()
    EnsureIndex()


```

Setting up the recordset and opening a database connection...

The function queries the database to count existing records for today's date, then retrieves that count value and starts building a serial number by formatting the current date.

Finishing the serial number construction...

I'm seeing the critical issue now—the Catch block is completely empty, so any database error silently fails and returns an empty string for the serial number instead of handling the exception properly. The real problem is that `Create_Serial()` swallows all exceptions internally with an empty catch block, so it returns an empty string instead of letting the error bubble up. This means the outer try/catch never sees an exception—the function silently fails, sets the serial to empty, and advances to wStep=7 as if nothing went wrong.

원인 파악 완료. 핵심 문제는 `Create_Serial()` 함수에 있습니다.

## 원인 분석

**`Create_Serial()` (908행)이 DB 예외 발생 시 빈 문자열을 반환하는 구조적 문제**

```vb
Private Function Create_Serial() As String
    Dim tmp As String = ""          ' ← 초기값 빈 문자열
    Connection_Open()
    Try
        ' DB 조회 ...
        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(cnt + LOT_START + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text & srcColorCode.Text
    Catch ex As Exception
        ' ← 여기가 비어 있음! 예외를 삼킴
    Finally
        ' Rs 정리
    End Try
    Return tmp                      ' ← 예외 발생 시 "" 반환
End Function
```

**흐름:**

1. `wStep=6`에서 `Create_Serial()` 호출
2. DB 연결 불안정/데드락/타임아웃 등으로 내부 예외 발생
3. **내부 Catch가 비어 있어** 예외를 삼키고 `tmp = ""` 그대로 반환
4. `srcSerialNumber.Text = ""` 설정됨
5. 외부 Try/Catch는 예외를 못 잡으므로 **wStep=7로 정상 진행**
6. 이후 wStep 9→11→12→13→13.1까지 빈 시리얼로 진행
7. `SavePallet(RFID_TAG_ID, "")` → **빈 SerialNumber로 DB 저장**

외부 wStep=6의 Try/Catch (1253행)는 `Create_Serial()` 실패 시 wStep을 유지하도록 설계했지만, **내부에서 예외를 삼켜버리므로 재시도 로직이 동작하지 않습니다.**

## 수정 방안

`Create_Serial()` 내부에서 예외를 재throw하거나, 반환값이 빈 문자열인지 체크하는 방법이 있습니다. 가장 간단하고 안전한 방법:

**방법 A** — `Create_Serial()` 에서 예외 재throw (추천)
**방법 B** — wStep=6에서 반환값 빈 문자열 체크

둘 다 적용하면 가장 안전합니다. 수정할까요?

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()
        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 28 Then
                        If Mid(sRecvData, 11, 1) = "E" Then
                            Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = tagId
                            ' 최초 인식 시 캡처
                            If RFID_TAG_ID = "" Then RFID_TAG_ID = tagId
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                    Else
                        Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    End If
                    sRecvData = ""
                    Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            End If
            Thread.Sleep(10)
        Loop
    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

content.thinking:
Now I have a clear picture of both issues. Let me trace the RFID_TAG_ID flow:

1. `wStep=2`: `RFID_TAG_ID = ""` (cleared at start of cycle)
2. `FLAG_RFID_RUN = True` is set at the top of `Tmr_Work1_Tick` (line 1144) - always true
3. `Read_RFiD()` is called from `Tmr_Connect1_Tick` every ~1 second (RF_READ_COUNT >= 1, interval 500ms)
4. `ThreadTask1()` runs continuously in a background thread, reading RFID responses


5. When a valid tag arrives (28 characters, "E" at position 11), `ThreadTask1` populates `RFID_TAG_ID` if empty

The core problem is a race condition: `RFID_TAG_ID` gets cleared at wStep 2, but the background thread is asynchronously writing to it while the main flow races through steps 3-13 calling SavePallet before any tag data arrives. The read command fires every second, but there's no synchronization ensuring the response is captured before the workflow advances. happens asynchronously. If:
1. The RFID reader doesn't respond in time (no tag present, communication error)
2. The response doesn't meet the criteria (length ≠ 28, or position 11 ≠ "E")
3. Serial port error

Then RFID_TAG_ID could still be "" when wStep=13.1 is reached.

Looking more closely at the timing:
- `Read_RFiD()` is called every ~1 second from `Tmr_Connect1` 
- The work timer `Tmr_Work1` runs every 100ms
- wStep goes from 2 to 13.1 through many steps, each happening at 100ms intervals
- That's roughly 2→3→3.1→4→5→6→7→8→9 (waiting for scan/torque) → 11→12→13→13.1

So wStep=9 waits for all checks to pass, which usually gives the RFID enough time to be read. But the real problem is that RFID_TAG_ID gets accessed from multiple threads—the timer thread sends the read command every second while the serial port thread handles responses—and there's no validation that RFID_TAG_ID actually contains a value before SavePallet runs. Looking at the RFID parsing logic, the reader only sets RFID_TAG_ID if the incoming data is exactly 28 characters long and has "E" at position 11—any deviation leaves the tag ID empty, which means the pallet could be saved without valid RFID data even if the reader is technically responding.

## 원인 분석 종합

`SavePallet(RFID_TAG_ID, srcSerialNumber.Text)` (1300행)에서 **두 파라미터 모두 빈 문자열로 저장될 수 있는 경로가 존재**합니다.

---

### 1. SerialNumber 빈 문자열 원인

`Create_Serial()` (908행)에서 내부 Catch가 비어 있어 DB 예외 시 `""` 반환 → wStep=6 외부 Try/Catch가 못 잡아서 wStep=7로 정상 진행 → 빈 시리얼로 끝까지 감

### 2. RFID_TAG_ID 빈 문자열 원인

```
wStep=2 (1158행): RFID_TAG_ID = ""  클리어
    ↓
ThreadTask1 (685행): RFID 응답 수신 시 RFID_TAG_ID = tagId 설정 (비동기)
    ↓
wStep=13.1 (1300행): SavePallet(RFID_TAG_ID, ...) 호출
```

- `Read_RFiD()` 명령은 `Tmr_Connect1`에서 **~1초 간격** 발송 (1461~1466행)
- `ThreadTask1` (672행)에서 응답 파싱 시 `sRecvData.Length = 28` **그리고** 11번째 문자가 `"E"`인 경우에만 RFID_TAG_ID 할당
- 응답 길이가 28이 아니거나, "E"로 시작하지 않거나, RFID 통신 오류 시 → `RFID_TAG_ID`는 `""` 유지
- **wStep 진행 시 RFID_TAG_ID가 비어있는지 확인하는 로직이 전혀 없음**

---

### 수정 방안

**wStep=13.1에서 SavePallet 호출 전 유효성 검증 추가:**

```vb
' 현재 코드 (1298행)
ElseIf wStep = 13.1 Then
    Try
        SavePallet(RFID_TAG_ID, srcSerialNumber.Text)
        ...

' 수정안
ElseIf wStep = 13.1 Then
    If RFID_TAG_ID = "" OrElse srcSerialNumber.Text = "" Then
        ' 빈 값이면 저장하지 않고 대기 (다음 틱에 재시도)
        Exit Sub
    End If
    Try
        SavePallet(RFID_TAG_ID, srcSerialNumber.Text)
        ...
```

**+ `Create_Serial()` 예외 전파 수정:**

```vb
' 현재 (923행) - 빈 Catch
Catch ex As Exception

' 수정안 - 예외 재throw
Catch ex As Exception
    Throw  ' 외부 wStep=6의 Try/Catch에서 잡아서 재시도되도록
```

이 두 군데 수정하면 될까요?

content.thinking:
The user is saying that RFID_TAG_ID should always have data by the time SavePallet is called - because RFID must be read for the process to proceed. They're questioning whether RFID_TAG_ID being empty at save time is actually a realistic scenario.

Let me re-examine the flow more carefully. The user knows the physical process better than me. Let me look at the wStep flow again:

- wStep=0: Waiting for PLC_VALUE(0)=1 AND PLC_VALUE(1)=1
- wStep=2: Init, RFID_TAG_ID="" cleared


- wStep=3: Check current part and load it
- wStep=4: PLC writes specs
- wStep=5-6: Create serial number
- wStep=7-9: Wait for motor barcode, torque, and harness scan confirmations
- wStep=11-13: PLC handshake sequence
- wStep=13.1: SavePallet

Since RFID is being read continuously by ThreadTask1 in the background, RFID_TAG_ID should indeed be populated well before we reach the SavePallet step.

The user mentioned that sometimes serialno is empty, and sometimes RFID_TAG_ID is empty too. So the issue might not be about timing or the RFID reader failing—it could be something else causing these values to not get captured properly. 사용자가 지적하는 게 맞네 - RFID_TAG_ID는 wStep=13.1에 도달하기 전에 이미 데이터가 들어와야 하고, 저장 시점에 비어있으면 안 된다는 뜻이다. 그렇다면 serialno와 RFID_TAG_ID가 모두 비어있는 경우의 원인을 다시 생각해봐야 한다. PLC 리셋 로직을 다시 확인해보니, 저장 단계에서 PLC 리셋을 무시하는 부분이 있는데...

아, wStep=2에서 Init_Control()이 실행되면서 srcSerialNumber와 RFID_TAG_ID를 초기화하는 게 문제일 수 있겠다. 그런데 UI 스레드의 타이머와 백그라운드 스레드의 작업 간 동기화 문제가 있을 수 있다.

ThreadTask1에서 RFID_TAG_ID에 값을 할당하는데, 동시에 타이머가 wStep을 변경하면서 Init_Control()을 호출하면 race condition이 발생할 수 있다. 사용자가 보고한 serialno가 비어서 저장되는 현상이 바로 이 타이밍 문제 때문일 가능성이 높다. The user seems to be pointing out that RFID data should normally be present at save time since it comes into RFID_TAG_ID, so they're asking what could cause it to be empty despite this. I'm now considering whether a PLC reset between workflow steps could clear the RFID_TAG_ID value—if PLC_VALUE drops momentarily, it might trigger a reset that wipes the field before the save completes.

I'm also thinking about thread safety with the RFID_TAG_ID variable being accessed from both the UI timer and background threads, though .NET's atomic reference assignment should handle this. The real question is whether there's a path where the workflow jumps to step 13.1 without RFID being populated, or if both RFID_TAG_ID and SerialNumber being empty points to a single underlying cause rather than separate issues.

Now I'm wondering if there's a re-entrancy problem with the timer itself. The WinForms timer fires every 100ms on the UI thread and shouldn't allow overlapping ticks, but COM interop with the PLC object could be pumping messages and potentially causing unexpected behavior.

Looking at the CLAUDE.md file, I see that ST03/ST05 actually implemented a fix for this exact issue—they added busy flags to prevent timer re-entrancy during ADODB calls. But it seems this fix wasn't applied to the current version I'm looking at.

The problem is clear now: if Tmr_Work1_Tick re-enters while an ADODB call is happening, the wStep variable hasn't been updated yet since it only changes after the database operation completes. This means the second tick would try to execute the same step again, potentially causing duplicate operations or crashes. Looking at the SavePallet step more carefully, I see that wStep stays at 13.1 during the ADODB call, so if re-entrancy fires while that's happening, tick 2 would also try to call SavePallet with the same data. There's no re-entrancy guard protecting this section, which could cause duplicate operations. But the real issue might be if re-entrancy somehow triggers a state reset that clears the serial number before it gets saved.

Actually, I'm realizing the more critical problem: there's a reset condition at the top of the timer that checks if PLC_VALUE(0) equals 0 and wStep is between 0 and 13, and if so it clears everything and resets wStep to 0. If re-entrancy causes a second tick to fire while the first tick is in the middle of a database call during steps 3-12, that second tick could see PLC_VALUE(0) as 0 and reset wStep before the first tick finishes its operation. This corrupts the state machine because the original tick would then update wStep to the next value, but the serial number and other data have already been cleared.

Given that ST03 and ST05 had re-entrancy fixes applied but ST01 didn't, this is almost certainly the same timer re-entrancy issue. When Tmr_Work1_Tick makes ADODB or COM calls, the message pump allows the timer to fire again, which can corrupt wStep and the RFID_TAG_ID variable. The most likely scenario is that one tick is executing a database operation while a second tick re-enters and either resets wStep to 0 or overwrites RFID_TAG_ID before the first tick completes. The user is asking why RFID_TAG_ID would be empty if it's always read before the save completes. The most likely explanation is re-entrancy in the timer tick—while SavePallet is executing a database call, the timer fires again and runs Init_Control(), which clears both the serial number and RFID_TAG_ID fields before the save finishes.

Let me trace through a re-entrancy scenario during Create_Serial instead: the initial tick calls Create_Serial with a database operation, the timer re-enters while that's still executing, and depending on the PLC state and step value, it could trigger Init_Control() and wipe the values before the original operation completes. ...while Tick A is still blocked in its ADODB call, Tick B runs through its entire sequence—getting its own serial number, advancing wStep all the way through, and potentially calling SavePallet with B's data. When Tick A finally resumes and completes, it overwrites srcSerialNumber with its own serial and sets wStep back to 7, but wStep has already been moved forward by Tick B, creating a tangled state where the two executions have corrupted each other's progress.

This is almost certainly the same re-entrancy problem that was already fixed in ST03 and ST05 using a tmrBusy guard—but that fix was never applied to ST01. The ADODB COM calls are pumping messages and allowing the timer to fire again while the first tick is still running, and I should check whether ST01 actually has that busy flag protection.

**원인 확정.** ST03/ST05에는 `tmr1Busy` 재진입 방지가 있지만, **ST01에는 없습니다.**

## 진짜 원인: 타이머 재진입 (ST01에만 미적용)

`Tmr_Work1_Tick` 안에서 ADODB COM 호출(`Create_Serial`, `SavePallet`, `Save_DB` 등) 시 **메시지 펌프가 돌면서 타이머가 재진입**합니다.

**빈 SerialNumber 시나리오:**
1. Tick A: wStep=6, `Create_Serial()` ADODB 호출 중...
2. 메시지 펌프 → Tick B 재진입
3. Tick B: wStep 아직 6 → `Create_Serial()` 또 호출
4. Tick B가 wStep을 7→8→9... 쭉 진행
5. Tick A의 `Create_Serial()` 리턴 → `srcSerialNumber.Text` **덮어쓰기** + wStep=7로 되돌림
6. 상태 꼬임 → 이후 SavePallet에 빈 값이나 잘못된 값 저장

**빈 RFID_TAG_ID 시나리오:**
1. Tick A: wStep=13.1, `SavePallet()` ADODB 호출 중...
2. 메시지 펌프 → Tick B 재진입
3. 저장 완료 후 다음 사이클 시작 → wStep=2에서 `RFID_TAG_ID = ""` 클리어
4. Tick A의 SavePallet 리턴 → 이미 클리어된 상태에서 다시 진행

ST03/ST05에서 고쳤던 것과 **동일한 수정**을 ST01에도 적용하면 됩니다. 수정할까요?

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL
            Serial_Tool.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool.Open()
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL)
        End Try


    End Sub
